name: epistery/message-board
title: Message board
description: Community message board with whitelist and notabot access control
author: Epistery

tools.name: message_channels
tools.description: List available message board channels. Returns channels the caller has access to.

tools.name: message_list
tools.description: List message board posts. Optionally filter by channel.

channel.description: Channel name to filter by (e.g. 'general'). Omit for all channels.

tools.name: message_post
tools.description: Post a message to the message board.
